Device.$description: Breakpoint name for variant binding - matches component Platform/Device variant options.

Device-Width.$description: Canonical desktop frame width (1440px, legacy Brand-book grid). Bind frame width to snap templates per mode. XXL 1920 exists for marketing heroes - same 12 columns at 104px with 32 gutter.

Columns.$description: Grid columns at desktop (12). Reference value - layout is auto-layout-first, no Figma grid styles.

Gutter.$description: Gutter between columns at desktop (16px). Use as item spacing in column rows.

Margin.$description: Outer page margin at desktop (152px, centers the 12x80 grid at 1440). Bind to template frame side padding.

Root-Font-Size.$description: Root rem base (16px) - matches Typography Primitives Size/16. Constant across breakpoints until code adopts responsive type scaling.

Device.$description: Breakpoint name for variant binding - matches component Platform/Device variant options.

Device-Width.$description: Canonical tablet frame width (768px, legacy Brand-book grid). Bind frame width to snap templates per mode.

Columns.$description: Grid columns at tablet (8). Reference value - layout is auto-layout-first, no Figma grid styles.

Gutter.$description: Gutter between columns at tablet (16px). Use as item spacing in column rows.

Margin.$description: Outer page margin at tablet (24px). Bind to template frame side padding.

Root-Font-Size.$description: Root rem base (16px) - matches Typography Primitives Size/16. Constant across breakpoints until code adopts responsive type scaling.

Device.$description: Breakpoint name for variant binding - matches component Platform/Device variant options.

Device-Width.$description: Canonical mobile frame width (375px, legacy Brand-book grid). Bind frame width to snap templates per mode.

Columns.$description: Grid columns at mobile (2). Reference value - layout is auto-layout-first, no Figma grid styles.

Gutter.$description: Gutter between columns at mobile (16px). Use as item spacing in column rows.

Margin.$description: Outer page margin at mobile (16px). Bind to template frame side padding.

Root-Font-Size.$description: Root rem base (16px) - matches Typography Primitives Size/16. Constant across breakpoints until code adopts responsive type scaling.
